languages.text: {n}Ксенос медленно кивает.{/n} "Сколь удовлетворительно было отмщение, которое они обрушили на прочих низших после позорного бегства расхитителя".
{n}The xenos nods slowly.{/n} "So satisfying was the vengeance they unleashed upon the other lowly ones after the plunderer's disgraceful flight."
languages.original_text: {n}Ксенос медленно кивает.{/n} "Сколь удовлетворительно было отмщение, которое они обрушили на прочих низших после позорного бегства расхитителя".

traits.locale_text: {n}The xenos nods slowly.{/n} "So satisfying was the vengeance they unleashed upon the other lowly ones after the plunderer's disgraceful flight."

{n}The xenos nods slowly.{/n} "So satisfying was the vengeance they unleashed upon the other lowly ones after the plunderer's disgraceful flight."

languages.text: {n}异形缓缓点头。{/n}“在劫掠者狼狈逃窜之后，他们对其他卑贱者展开的报复……令人无比满足。”
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos nods slowly.{/n} "So satisfying was the vengeance they unleashed upon the other lowly ones after the plunderer's disgraceful flight."

traits.locale_text: {n}异形缓缓点头。{/n}“在劫掠者狼狈逃窜之后，他们对其他卑贱者展开的报复……令人无比满足。”

languages.text: {n}El xenos asiente lentamente.{/n} «La venganza que desataron ante el resto de miserables tras la vergonzosa huida del saqueador fue digna de admiración».
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos nods slowly.{/n} "So satisfying was the vengeance they unleashed upon the other lowly ones after the plunderer's disgraceful flight."

traits.locale_text: {n}El xenos asiente lentamente.{/n} «La venganza que desataron ante el resto de miserables tras la vergonzosa huida del saqueador fue digna de admiración».

languages.text: {n}Le xénos hoche lentement la tête.{/n} « La vengeance subie par les autres créatures inférieures fut source d'une grande satisfaction, suite à la fuite honteuse du pillard. »
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos nods slowly.{/n} "So satisfying was the vengeance they unleashed upon the other lowly ones after the plunderer's disgraceful flight."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le xénos hoche lentement la tête.{/n} « La vengeance subie par les autres créatures inférieures fut source d'une grande satisfaction, suite à la fuite honteuse du pillard. »

languages.text: {n}Zeno yavaşça başını sallıyor.{/n} "Yağmacının utanç verici kaçışından sonra diğer adilerden aldıkları intikam o kadar tatmin ediciydi ki."
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos nods slowly.{/n} "So satisfying was the vengeance they unleashed upon the other lowly ones after the plunderer's disgraceful flight."

traits.locale_text: {n}Zeno yavaşça başını sallıyor.{/n} "Yağmacının utanç verici kaçışından sonra diğer adilerden aldıkları intikam o kadar tatmin ediciydi ki."

languages.text: {n}Der Xenos nickt langsam.{/n} "Die Rache, die sie nach der unwürdigen Flucht des Plünderers an den anderen niederen Wesen nahmen, war sehr befriedigend."
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos nods slowly.{/n} "So satisfying was the vengeance they unleashed upon the other lowly ones after the plunderer's disgraceful flight."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Xenos nickt langsam.{/n} "Die Rache, die sie nach der unwürdigen Flucht des Plünderers an den anderen niederen Wesen nahmen, war sehr befriedigend."

languages.text: {n}異種族がゆっくりと頷く。{/n}「略奪者たちが恥辱を被って逃げていった後、彼らが他者に対して行った報復は、実に満足のいくものだった」
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos nods slowly.{/n} "So satisfying was the vengeance they unleashed upon the other lowly ones after the plunderer's disgraceful flight."

traits.locale_text: {n}異種族がゆっくりと頷く。「略奪者たちが恥辱を被って逃げていった後、彼らが他者に対して行った報復は、実に満足のいくものだった」
